seoTitle: Prestons vs Pretty Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Prestons and Pretty Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Prestons vs Pretty Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Prestons and Pretty Beach.
heading: Prestons vs Pretty Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Prestons, New South Wales and Pretty Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Prestons has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Pretty Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Prestons or Pretty Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Prestons has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Pretty Beach scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Prestons scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Pretty Beach scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Prestons or Pretty Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Prestons has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
